description: Machine-readable canonical ownership map mirrored in plans/project-context.md Canonical Source Matrix.

entries.notes: Defines allowed executor_agent names for phases.
Defines the 3 review-only roles performed inline by controlflow-verify.
Defines schema outputs, tool profiles, and delegation sources for project roles.
Maps file counts/risk to pipeline depth.
Defines the 7 risk categories evaluated during planning.
Slimmed policy: review_pipeline_by_tier (tier-gated verify/review depth), semantic_risk_policy (7 categories + override), verdict_routing (verify verdicts + confidence thresholds).
Mandates evidence citations for claims across all roles.
